Pull Request Template

📌 Summary

Provide a clear and concise description of the changes introduced in this PR.

Mention the motivation and context behind the changes.

🔄 Type of Change

[ ] Feature

[ ] Bug Fix

[ ] Documentation Update

[ ] Refactor

[ ] CI/CD Workflow

[ ] Other (please specify)

✅ Checklist

[ ] Code follows project style guidelines

[ ] Tests added or updated

[ ] Documentation updated (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.)

[ ] CI/CD pipeline passes

[ ] No sensitive files committed (e.g., .db, .log, .venv)

🧪 Testing

Describe how you tested the changes.

Include steps to reproduce and screenshots if applicable.

📂 Files Changed

List the key files modified or added.

📣 Additional Notes

Add any extra context, references, or follow-up tasks here.
